subject: grammar
title: Reporting Verbs
instruction: Underline (choose) the correct verb in each sentence.

questions.text: Some people ___ that banning cars from city centres would reduce pollution.
The organisation campaigns against pollution and for the environment and they ___ people to start walking and cycling more.
My boyfriend is always forgetting things so it was a good thing I ___ him to bring his passport when we went on holiday.
I was very unhappy with the service so I ___ to the manager and he gave me a discount on my meal.
I needed to talk to my boss so I ___ a meeting and we arranged one for later that day.
The students felt very strongly about the issue and ___ on seeing the vice-chancellor to discuss it.
I asked him really nicely but he still ___ to help me.
The tennis player regretted his actions and ___ for his behaviour afterwards.
Jane was having difficulties sleeping and the doctor ___ her to take some rest from her heavy work schedule.
The armed robbers ___ the bank staff not to move or they might use their guns.
